title: Oil Rallies Toward $120 As Middle East Supply Risks Spiral
summary: Oil prices extended their rally on Wednesday after reports emerged that the U.S. will tighten its blockade on Iranian ports, prolonging fears of reduced oil supply from the region, and as the UAE hit markets with its OPEC-exit announcement. Brent crude for June delivery jumped 6.45% to trade at $11…

title: Analysis: The Warsh revolution is coming. Powell won’t stand in the way.
summary: The outgoing leader may be staying on in a lesser capacity, but he won't be a spoiler in Kevin Warsh's Fed.

title: Shocking UAE exit rocks OPEC, but group will still hold significant sway over the oil market
summary: UAE leaving OPEC will have huge ramifications.

title: Hormuz Blockage Boosts Panama Canal Oil Tanker Traffic
summary: Oil tanker traffic through the Panama Canal has jumped in recent weeks as Asia scrambles to buy U.S. crude amid choked supply from the Middle East. title: CVC pumps cash into Lipton as €4.5bn tea deal comes off the boil
summary: Private equity firm injects €210mn amid fears of a debt restructuring at Unilever’s former tea business
